items.title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
items.summary: A new research paper introduces CORAL, a framework for autonomous multi-agent evolution aimed at open-ended discovery, demonstrating advancements in AI's ability to self-improve and explore complex problem spaces.

items.title: AI Companies Are Building Huge Natural Gas Plants to Power Data Centers, Raising Environmental Concerns
items.summary: AI companies are increasingly investing in large natural gas power plants to meet the immense energy demands of their data centers, sparking debate over the environmental impact of AI's rapid expansion.

items.title: Anthropic Says Claude Code Subscribers Will Need to Pay Extra for OpenClaw Usage
items.summary: Anthropic announces that its Claude Code subscribers will face additional charges for using the OpenClaw feature, signaling a shift in pricing strategy for advanced AI capabilities.

items.title: Intelligence-per-Token: Why AI's Cost Problem Is Forcing a Reckoning in 2026
items.summary: The article highlights that the escalating cost of AI operations, measured by 'intelligence-per-token,' is becoming a critical challenge, pushing the industry towards a necessary re-evaluation of efficiency and economic models in 2026.

items.title: From Copilots to Colleagues: What the Agent Era Actually Looks Like
items.summary: This piece explores the evolving landscape of AI, suggesting that the current 'copilot' phase is transitioning into an 'agent era' where AI systems function more as autonomous colleagues, fundamentally changing human-AI collaboration.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M After Viral Billboard Hiring Stunt to Scale AI Customer Interviews
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a highly successful viral billboard campaign, aiming to expand its AI-powered platform for conducting and analyzing customer interviews.

items.title: Anthropic Is Having a Moment in the Private Markets; SpaceX Could Spoil the Party
items.summary: Anthropic is experiencing significant momentum in private market valuations, though potential competition or market shifts from other major players like SpaceX could impact its trajectory.

items.title: Codex Now Offers More Flexible Pricing for Teams
items.summary: OpenAI's Codex introduces new flexible pricing options designed to better accommodate the needs and budgets of development teams utilizing its AI code generation capabilities.

items.title: VOID: Video Object and Interaction Deletion
items.summary: A new research paper introduces VOID, a method for deleting specific objects and their interactions from videos, offering advanced capabilities in video manipulation and content editing.

items.title: Transform Your Headphones into a Live Personal Translator on iOS
items.summary: Google announces a new iOS feature that turns standard headphones into a real-time personal translator, enabling seamless communication across language barriers.

items.title: NearID: Identity Representation Learning via Near-identity Distractors
items.summary: Researchers propose NearID, a novel approach to learning robust identity representations by leveraging 'near-identity' distractors, improving performance in tasks like facial recognition and verification.

items.title: LatentUM: Unleashing the Potential of Interleaved Cross-Modal Reasoning via a Latent-Space Unified Model
items.summary: LatentUM presents a unified model that utilizes a shared latent space to enable powerful interleaved cross-modal reasoning, enhancing AI's ability to understand and integrate information from different data types.

items.title: Omni-SimpleMem: Autoresearch-Guided Discovery of Lifelong Multimodal Agent Memory
items.summary: Omni-SimpleMem introduces a system that uses autoresearch to discover and implement lifelong multimodal memory for AI agents, allowing them to continuously learn and retain information across various data types.

items.title: Therefore I am. I Think
items.summary: This paper delves into the philosophical and technical aspects of AI consciousness and self-awareness, exploring the implications of advanced AI models exhibiting complex reasoning and introspection.

items.title: The Design of AI Memory Systems
items.summary: This article explores various architectural approaches and challenges in designing effective memory systems for AI agents, crucial for their ability to learn, reason, and operate over extended periods.
